categories.label: Monster Victory Points
categories.description: Total VP printed on all slain Monster cards in your Victory stack

categories.label: Domain Victory Points
categories.description: Total VP printed on all built Domain cards in your tableau

categories.label: Victory Point Tokens
categories.description: 1 point per Victory Point token collected during the game

categories.label: Duke Bonus Points
categories.description: Victory Points scored from your secret Duke card's end-game condition
